prompt: Generate this receipt as if it were a secret agent's mission briefing, with 'redacted' text, a 'classified' stamp, and an official-looking government header.
prompt_refined: Generate a secret agent's mission briefing document based on the content and layout of image 1. Transform the email interface into an official-looking government document. Replace the original email header with a formal government header at the top, featuring a generic agency name (e.g., 'Department of Special Operations' or 'Central Intelligence Agency') and a government seal or emblem positioned on the left side of this header. Redact specific sensitive information from image 1 by obscuring it with solid black bars: this includes all instances of the recipient's name ('Pamella Neely'), the sender's email ('ctf@coloradotrail.org'), the 'Invoice #' number ('000005096'), the full 'Item #' and 'Description' text ('CLBNDL | 2014 CT Collegiate Loop Package'), the 'Shipping Information' address ('2239 Vuelta San Marcos Santa Fe, NM 87505'), the phone number ('(303) 384-3729'), and all embedded URLs. Overlay a prominent 'CLASSIFIED' stamp, in a bold red color and slightly diagonal, across the top-right section of the document, as if stamped by hand.
objects: Formal government header at the top
Generic agency name in the header
Government seal or emblem on the left side of the header
Recipient's name (Pamella Neely) obscured by solid black bars
Sender's email (ctf@coloradotrail.org) obscured by solid black bars
Invoice number (000005096) obscured by solid black bars
Item number and description (CLBNDL | 2014 CT Collegiate Loop Package) obscured by solid black bars
Shipping Information address obscured by solid black bars
Prominent 'CLASSIFIED' stamp in bold red and diagonal across the top-right
